heading: Establishment of policy for National Nuclear Security Administration
label: 7144 Establishment of policy for National Nuclear Security Administration
notes: Effective DateSection effective , see , set out as a note under , War and National Defense.Mar. 1, 2000section 3299 of Pub. L. 106–65section 2401 of Title 50

children.heading: Responsibility for establishing policy
children.label: a Responsibility for establishing policy
children.text: The Secretary shall be responsible for establishing policy for the National Nuclear Security Administration.

children.heading: Review of programs and activities
children.label: b Review of programs and activities
children.text: The Secretary may direct officials of the Department who are not within the National Nuclear Security Administration to review the programs and activities of the Administration and to make recommendations to the Secretary regarding administration of those programs and activities, including consistency with other similar programs and activities of the Department.

children.heading: Staff
children.label: c Staff
children.text: The Secretary shall have adequate staff to support the Secretary in carrying out the Secretary’s responsibilities under this section.
